name: SurrealDB
description: SurrealDB is a multi-model database that combines the power of document, graph, and relational databases into a single platform, offering real-time queries, built-in permissions, and a simplified backend stack.

notes.text: Accessing http://IP:8000 redirects to surrealdb.com/surrealist — this is by design. The hosted Surrealist UI connects back to your local instance. Use http://IP:8000 as the connection URL in Surrealist.
The generated root password is stored in /opt/surrealdb/.env.
